description.en: Play the Vindicator ifyou want to use martial prowess to enact your own personal justice.

Marked by the Veil also informs you about the circumstances of the death (murder, accident, etc.). Once per long rest, you can also spend a Hope to make a particular death your active case.

You may ask your GM one *yes or no* question about your case. The GM must answer truthfully. Additionally, You gain advantage on Instinct Rolls to track or perceive individuals plausibly related to your case.
Whenever you force an adversary to mark their last Hit Point, you **clear a Stress.**

Mark a Stress to gain advantage on your next Action Roll or increase your Proficiency on your next damage roll by +1.

When targeting a suspect in your active case, the effects of **Certainty** last until your next rest and the Proficieny bonus increases to +2.
When targeting a suspect in your active case, Fearmonger can also be activated whenever you succeed an Attack or Spellcast Roll with Fear against them.
Twice per session, when your GM would **gain a Fear**, you can instead **mark 3 Stress** to **grant 2 Hope** to any ally within Far range.
Play the Wraith if you want to manipulate both adversaries and environments with the power of shadows and fear.

When you would wield a physical weapon, that calls for Strength, you instead treat it as a magical weapon calling for Knowledge. However, you can only wield magical weapons.

If you hit a Vulnerable target with your weapon, **spend 2 Hope** to make it temporarily Restrained and vice versa.
While you have two or fewer Hit Points unmarked, temporarily gain a +2 bonus to your Evasion and 1 additional Armor slot.

You gain an amount of tokens equal to your Spellcast Trait called **Dreadmarks**. You can assign any number of them to creatures within Far range you can clearly identify.

Once per Scene, you may **mark a Stress** to gain an additional temporary **Dreadmarks** token. **Dreadmarks** reset on a long rest.

**Spend 2 Hope** to trigger a Dreadmark for one of the following effects:

- The target becomes temporarily Vulnerable.

- You gain advantage on Presence rolls against the target until your next rest.

- The target must **mark a Stress**.

- You teleport to the target as long as it is within Far range.

Once per rest, you can expand your shadow into a haunting realm that encompasses Close range around you. This area follows you as you move.

When an adversary enters this area for the first time, they must succeed a Reaction Roll (16) or be drawn into your realm. This realm reflects your character's history, emotional landscape or a similar feature.

As long as they are within your realm, adversaries cannot remove the Vulnerable or Restrained condition and any **Dreadmarks** on them can be triggered without spending Hope.
